summary: Tested Tournament UI improvements - Gironi qualification highlight, qualification message, and Regolamento tab. All features working correctly after fixing JSX structure issue.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed JSX structure issue in rankings.tsx where ScrollView closing tag was mismatched with fragment closing tag
Added Array.isArray() guard for trkGroups.map() to prevent 'trkGroups.map is not a function' error during initial render
data-testid='tournament-rules' element not found - the Regolamento tab content may need the data-testid attribute added for better testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tournament UI features are working: Gironi tab shows qualification message 'I primi X giocatori di ogni girone si qualificano', green highlight rows match API qualifies value, and Regolamento tab shows tournament structure, knockout format (dynamically calculated), tiebreak rules 1-4, and group stage rules.

backend_api.GET /api/tournaments/{id}/groups: Returns object with groups array, advance_count=2, players_per_group=4, groups_count=2
backend_api.groups_array: Each group has qualifies field matching advance_count
backend_api.standings_fields: total_correct, exact_hits, onextwo_hits present in each standings entry

frontend_gironi_tab.qualification_message: I primi 2 giocatori di ogni girone si qualificano per la fase a eliminazione diretta - VISIBLE
frontend_gironi_tab.green_highlight_rows: First 2 players in each group have green rank numbers based on API qualifies value

frontend_regolamento_tab.knockout_format: 1. Semifinale, 2. Finale (dynamic based on 4 qualified players)
frontend_regolamento_tab.tiebreak_rules: 1. Più pronostici indovinati, 2. Più risultati esatti indovinati, 3. Più 1X2 indovinati, 4. Sorteggio automatico
frontend_regolamento_tab.group_stage_rules: Vittoria: 3 punti, Pareggio: 1 punto, Sconfitta: 0 punti
